playbook.intent: Greenfield infra bootstrap: k8s + CI/CD + observability + secrets (4 weeks)
playbook.scope: Day-0 production platform stood up for a new product line: VPC + k8s cluster, GitOps-driven CI/CD, baseline observability (logs/metrics), centralized secrets, on-call rotation in place. Exit: first service deployed via the platform, alerts firing to a real channel, runbook drafted.

success-criteria.criterion: Day-0 production platform stood up for a new product line: VPC + k8s cluster, GitOps-driven CI/CD, baseline observability (logs/metrics), centralized secrets, on-call rotation in place. Exit: first service deployed via the platform, alerts firing to a real channel, runbook drafted
Decision gates passed at every stage with written rationale
Outputs of each stage filed in the canonical location for the team

stage.name: Plan & frame
stage.intent: Achieve the 'plan & frame' outcome for this playbook.

tasks.task: Define entry conditions for plan & frame
Execute the plan & frame work products listed in this playbook
Capture artifacts and decisions made during plan & frame

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the plan & frame outcome is reached AND blockers for the next stage are cleared.

stage.name: Inventory & baseline
stage.intent: Achieve the 'inventory & baseline' outcome for this playbook.

tasks.task: Define entry conditions for inventory & baseline
Execute the inventory & baseline work products listed in this playbook
Capture artifacts and decisions made during inventory & baseline

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the inventory & baseline outcome is reached AND blockers for the next stage are cleared.

stage.name: Design choices
stage.intent: Achieve the 'design choices' outcome for this playbook.

tasks.task: Define entry conditions for design choices
Execute the design choices work products listed in this playbook
Capture artifacts and decisions made during design choices

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the design choices outcome is reached AND blockers for the next stage are cleared.

stage.name: Pilot / dry-run
stage.intent: Achieve the 'pilot / dry-run' outcome for this playbook.

tasks.task: Define entry conditions for pilot / dry-run
Execute the pilot / dry-run work products listed in this playbook
Capture artifacts and decisions made during pilot / dry-run

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the pilot / dry-run outcome is reached AND blockers for the next stage are cleared.

stage.name: Roll-out
stage.intent: Achieve the 'roll-out' outcome for this playbook.

tasks.task: Define entry conditions for roll-out
Execute the roll-out work products listed in this playbook
Capture artifacts and decisions made during roll-out

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the roll-out outcome is reached AND blockers for the next stage are cleared.

stage.name: Verify & measure
stage.intent: Achieve the 'verify & measure' outcome for this playbook.

tasks.task: Define entry conditions for verify & measure
Execute the verify & measure work products listed in this playbook
Capture artifacts and decisions made during verify & measure

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the verify & measure outcome is reached AND blockers for the next stage are cleared.

stage.name: Document & handoff
stage.intent: Achieve the 'document & handoff' outcome for this playbook.

tasks.task: Define entry conditions for document & handoff
Execute the document & handoff work products listed in this playbook
Capture artifacts and decisions made during document & handoff

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the document & handoff outcome is reached AND blockers for the next stage are cleared.

stage.name: Decide / lock-in
stage.intent: Achieve the 'decide / lock-in' outcome for this playbook.

tasks.task: Define entry conditions for decide / lock-in
Execute the decide / lock-in work products listed in this playbook
Capture artifacts and decisions made during decide / lock-in

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the decide / lock-in outcome is reached AND blockers for the next stage are cleared.
